summary: 1. To strengthen the kidney to preserve essence, drprive dampness to relieve leucorrhagia. 2. To strengthen the spleen to relieve diarrhea.

1. Treatment of kidney-deficiency manifested as nocturnal emission, frequent micturition, enuresis, whitish and turbid urine, or leucorrhagia. 2. Treatment of diarrhea. For diarrhea of spleen-deficiency type.
